title: fees.rs select_notes InsufficientFunds shortfall underflows when have > need
description: FALSE ALARM — reviewed and confirmed no bug. In fees.rs select_notes(), the shortfall computation total_needed - have is safe because the loop exits only when sum < total_needed after visiting all notes, meaning have (= sum of all available notes) < total_needed. So have < total_needed and the subtraction does not underflow. The issue is that this safety argument is non-obvious and not documented. Suggested fix: add a debug_assert!(have < total_needed) before the subtraction, and add a code comment explaining why have cannot exceed total_needed here.
